home_sub: Create an event in seconds — no account needed. Guests RSVP from any device. Free for most events, premium from €5.
home_features_anonymous_body: Start an invitation from any browser. A magic link lets you manage it later.
home_features_global_body: Timezones, locales, and currencies handled automatically. Shareable in a click.
home_features_open_body: AGPLv3. Self-host the core, or use the hosted version. No lock-in.
home_how_step1_body: Fill in the basics and your email. We send you a magic link to manage the event.
home_how_step2_body: Send the link any way you like — message, email, social. No app required for guests.
home_how_step3_body: Watch RSVPs roll in. Send a reminder when the date approaches.
pricing_free_desc: Everything you need for a basic event. No account required.
legal_draft: Draft — will be finalised before public launch.
signin_blurb: Enter your email and we'll send you a one-time magic link. No password needed.
signin_check_body: We sent a magic link to sign you in. Click it from the same device and you'll be dropped back into your dashboard.
auth_continue_body: One more tap to finish signing in to vite.in.
auth_continue_note: This extra tap exists so that link-safety scanners (like Gmail's) can't accidentally consume your single-use sign-in link before you click it.
oauth_consent_intro: {appName} wants to access your vite.in account.
oauth_consent_note: You can revoke access at any time from your account settings.
oauth_consent_invalid_request: This authorization request is invalid or has expired. Try again from the application that brought you here.
oauth_scope_openid: Sign in with your vite.in identity
create_subtitle: No account needed. Your guests get a link, you get a magic link by email.
create_field_description_hint: Optional. Shown on the public event page.
create_field_email_hint: We'll send the management magic link here. No account needed.
create_visibility_link_only_hint: Default. Guests need the link to see and RSVP.
create_visibility_public_hint: Listed in the public directory (coming soon).
create_success_share_label: Share this link with your guests
create_success_magic_sent: A magic link to manage this event has been sent to your email.
create_success_dev_mode: Email delivery is disabled in this environment. Manage link:
dashboard_claim_one: Claimed 1 event to your account. Reload to see it.
dashboard_claim_many: Claimed {count} events to your account. Reload to see them.
dashboard_claim_none: No anonymously-created events matched your email.
dashboard_claim_submit: Claim events created with my email
dashboard_empty_or_claim: , or claim events you created anonymously with the same email.
event_locked_body: Enter the password you were given to see the details.
event_rsvp_thanks_maybe: Got it — we'll save you a spot.
event_rsvp_email_hint: We'll send you a confirmation if you provide one.
event_rsvp_plus_ones_names_hint: Helps the host prepare seating and name cards.
manage_reminder_body: Queues an email reminder to the creator address. Sent by the next cron run.
manage_announcements_body: Send a wave of emails to every guest on the invite list who has an email. Each stage can only be sent once per event.
manage_announcements_plus_hint: Save-the-Date requires the Plus tier. Invitation works on Basic and Plus.
manage_password_body_locked: This event requires a password to view.
manage_password_body_unlocked: Set a password and guests will have to enter it before they can see the event details.
manage_password_plus_required: Password protection is a Plus-tier feature. Upgrade to Plus to enable it.
manage_upgrade_body: One-time payment per event. Pick a tier and a currency.
manage_upgrade_already_paid: This event is premium. All extras are unlocked.
manage_upgrade_already_tier_basic: This event is on the Basic tier.
manage_upgrade_already_tier_plus: This event is on the Plus tier. All extras are unlocked.
manage_upgrade_success: Payment received. Premium features are now active.
manage_upgrade_canceled: Checkout canceled. No charge was made.
tier_plus_tagline: For weddings, formal events, and everything that matters.
err_unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
err_create_missing_fields: Please fill in title, start date, and your email.
err_create_failed: Could not create the event. Please try again.
err_signin_magic_link_http: Could not send the magic link (HTTP {status}).
err_rsvp_failed: Could not record your RSVP. Please try again.
err_manage_image_too_large: Image must be at most 10 MiB.
err_pwd_failed: Couldn't check the password. Please try again.
err_manage_password_too_short: Password must be at least 4 characters.
err_manage_password_plus_required: Password protection requires the Plus tier.
err_announcement_already_sent: That announcement stage has already been sent.
err_announcement_no_guests: Add guests with email addresses before sending.
err_announcement_too_many: Guest list exceeds the {max}-recipient MVP cap.
err_http_event_not_found: This event doesn't exist or has been removed.
err_http_creator_token_required: This page needs a valid management link. Check the email we sent you.
err_http_creator_token_invalid: Your management link is no longer valid. Request a new one from the recovery page.
err_http_missing_token_or_callback: This sign-in link is incomplete. Please request a new one.
cookie_consent_body: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in and remember your language. With your permission, we also use optional cookies to understand how the service is used.
settings_email_hint: Change your sign-in email from the support form (coming soon).
settings_name_hint: Shown on confirmation emails and your dashboard. Leave blank to clear.
settings_update_error: Couldn't save changes. Please try again.
settings_load_error: Profile failed to load. Reload or sign in again.
settings_export_body: Download a JSON bundle of your profile, events, and RSVPs.
settings_danger_body: Soft-deletes your account. There's a 30-day grace period during which you can restore by contacting support. Your anonymously-created events keep working via their creator magic-links.
settings_delete_confirm_required: Type DELETE in the field to confirm.
settings_delete_error: Account deletion failed. Try again or contact support.
manage_edit_ends_at_hint: Leave blank if it's a single-point event.
manage_delete_body: Soft-deletes the event. Guests can't RSVP anymore, the public page returns 404, and the link stops working. We keep the row for 30 days in case you need it restored — contact support.
manage_delete_confirm_required: Type DELETE in the field to confirm.
legal_needs_review_body: This page is a working draft based on standard templates and the operator's good-faith understanding. It must be reviewed by a qualified lawyer before public launch. Some fields (postal address, VAT identification) are placeholders until the Estonia OÜ registration completes.
impressum_intro: Information required under §5 TMG (Telemediengesetz) and Art. 22 SR 943.03 of Swiss federal law on the operator of this website.
impressum_operator_address_value: TODO — fill in residential address (will be replaced by the Estonia OÜ registered address once entity registration completes)
impressum_contact_response_note: Inquiries typically answered within two business days.
impressum_responsible_body: Editorial responsibility for the content of vite.in lies with the operator named above.
impressum_vat_body: Currently operating below the VAT registration threshold under Swiss law. EU VAT-OSS registration will be applied for after the Estonia OÜ is active. This page will be updated with the VAT ID once issued.
impressum_dispute_body: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR), available at ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr. We are not obliged and not generally willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
privacy_intro_body: vite.in lets people create event invitations, share them, and collect RSVPs. This notice explains what personal data we process, why, on what legal basis, with whom we share it, and what rights you have. It applies to vite.in and all its subdomains.
privacy_controller_body: The controller within the meaning of GDPR Art. 4 (7) is the operator listed in the {impressumLink}.
privacy_data_anonymous_body: When you create an event without an account: the email address you provide (for the magic link), the event details (title, date, location, description) and a hashed creator token. The plaintext token leaves the server only inside the magic-link email — we never store it.
privacy_data_rsvps_body: When a guest RSVPs: the name they enter, an optional email (used only for the confirmation email if they provide one), their status (yes/maybe/no), an optional message, and the plus-one details if the event has Plus tier enabled.
privacy_data_account_body: If you create an account: email address, optional display name, locale preference, and timezone. Sessions are tracked via a signed, server-side-validated cookie; we don't store passwords by default — sign-in is magic-link based.
privacy_data_payment_body: When you upgrade an event to premium: Stripe processes the payment. We see the resulting payment confirmation (success/failure, tier, currency), never your card number. Your billing address may be transmitted by Stripe to determine VAT.
privacy_data_logs_body: Operational logs include a request id, a salted hash of your IP address (never the raw IP), the route hit, response status, and Accept-Language. Errors are captured in Sentry (see sub-processors).
privacy_basis_body: Processing happens under GDPR Art. 6 (1) (b) (performance of contract — providing the service you sign up for), (c) (legal obligation — invoicing, tax retention) and (f) (legitimate interest — operational logging, fraud prevention, error monitoring). Optional analytics cookies (not currently active) would only run under (a) (consent), gated by the cookie banner.
privacy_subprocessors_body: We use the following services to operate vite.in. Each has a data processing agreement in place under GDPR Art. 28.
privacy_subprocessor_cloudflare: Cloudflare (US/global) — application hosting (Workers, Pages), object storage (R2), CDN, DDoS mitigation, DNS.
privacy_subprocessor_stripe: Stripe (US/global) — payment processing and tax calculation.
privacy_subprocessor_note: When the Phase-3 analytics layer goes live we will add the analytics provider here and require fresh consent for it via the cookie banner.
privacy_cookies_body: We use the following cookies, all first-party. None of them carry personally identifiable information that could be used outside vite.in.
privacy_cookie_consent: vitein_consent — your cookie-banner choice. Max-Age 1 year. Strictly necessary.
privacy_cookie_lang: paraglide_lang — your language preference so the site renders in the right locale on the next visit. Strictly necessary.
privacy_cookie_session: __Secure-better-auth.session_token — your authentication session if you sign in. HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Lax. Removed on sign-out.
privacy_retention_body: Account data is kept for as long as the account exists. On account deletion, soft-delete starts a 30-day grace period during which the account can be restored; after that, a cron job hard-deletes the rows. Events that have already happened are retained for one year after their start date for chargeback and audit purposes, then archived. Server logs are retained for 90 days; audit log entries are retained indefinitely as required for transaction-record purposes.
privacy_rights_body: Under GDPR Art. 15–22 you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and to object. You can also withdraw any consent you gave. Two paths to exercise these rights:
privacy_rights_self: Self-service — sign in, open /account/settings, and use the export and delete buttons there. Export returns a JSON bundle of your profile, events, and RSVPs. Delete starts the 30-day grace.
privacy_rights_contact: Email — privacy@vite.in. We answer within 30 days as required by Art. 12 (3) GDPR.
privacy_rights_complaint: You can also lodge a complaint with the data-protection authority of your habitual residence. In Germany this is the Landesdatenschutzbeauftragter of your federal state; in Switzerland the FDPIC.
privacy_transfers_body: Cloudflare and Stripe operate from the US and route requests through their global edge networks. Both are certified under the EU–US Data Privacy Framework (DPF) and have the Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) in place. Neon, Resend, and Sentry are configured to operate from EU regions.
privacy_changes_body: We will update this notice when the service or our sub-processors change. Substantial changes are flagged via an in-product banner. The “Last updated” date below reflects the most recent revision.
terms_intro_body: These Terms of Service govern your use of vite.in and its subdomains. By creating an event, RSVPing, signing in, or otherwise using the service, you agree to them. They apply alongside the {privacyLink}.
terms_service_body: vite.in is a platform for creating event invitations, sharing them with guests, and collecting RSVPs. Core functionality is free. Optional premium features (custom URL slug, removal of vite.in branding, password protection, named plus-ones, save-the-date emails) are available as a one-time per-event purchase.
terms_account_body: You can create events without an account — a magic link delivered to your email lets you manage them. Optionally you can create an account (magic-link sign-in, no password by default). One account per natural person. You're responsible for keeping your email inbox secure, since the magic link is the recovery mechanism.
terms_use_body: You agree not to use vite.in to:
terms_use_item_illegal: Distribute content that is illegal in your jurisdiction or the operator's (Switzerland / Estonia).
terms_use_item_spam: Send unsolicited bulk email or other unsolicited communications.
terms_use_item_harass: Harass, threaten, or impersonate other people.
terms_use_item_abuse: Probe, scan, or attempt to bypass our access controls, rate limits, or other technical protections.
terms_use_item_resell: Resell or sub-license the service without prior written agreement.
terms_use_consequences: We may suspend or terminate access for violations. Repeated or material violations may forfeit any remaining paid-event entitlements.
terms_premium_body: Premium features are a one-time purchase per event in the currency you select at checkout. Pricing is shown on the {pricingLink} page. Prices are anchored per currency (e.g. €5 = $5 = CHF 5) rather than FX-converted. Payment is processed by Stripe; we receive only the confirmation, never your card data. Premium activates immediately on successful payment and applies for the lifetime of that specific event.
terms_refund_body: You can request a no-questions refund within 14 days of purchase, as long as no reminder emails have been sent to your guests. After reminders have been sent, the service has been substantially used and refunds are no longer available. Request refunds at hello@vite.in with the event link and the email used at checkout.
terms_termination_body: You can stop using the service at any time. You can delete your account from {settingsLink}; this starts a 30-day grace period before the hard delete. Anonymously-created events you don't delete continue to exist until their natural expiry. We can terminate your access if you violate these terms or if the service must be wound down — we'll give 30 days notice for the latter.
terms_liability_body: The service is provided "as is" and "as available". To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law (including Swiss Code of Obligations Art. 100 and EU consumer protections), the operator is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of vite.in. Direct damages caused by gross negligence or wilful misconduct remain reserved. Nothing in these terms excludes mandatory consumer rights you have under EU law.
terms_changes_body: Material changes are announced in-product at least 30 days before they take effect. Continued use after the effective date means you accept the new terms; if you don't, you can delete your account before the effective date.
terms_law_body: These terms are governed by Swiss law, excluding its conflict-of-law rules. Venue is the courts at the operator's seat. After the Estonia OÜ becomes the controller, this section will be updated; existing customers will be notified.
terms_contact_body: Questions about these terms or about a specific event: hello@vite.in. Data-protection inquiries: privacy@vite.in.
pricing_subtitle: Free for most events. One-time payment per event for premium — no subscription, ever.
manage_media_premium_locked: Cover image upload is a premium feature. Upgrade this event (Basic or Plus) above to unlock it.
